mapper.select: select userid, auth from cotdl.tbl_member_auth where userid != 'admin' order by auth
mapper.insert: insert into COTDL.tbl_member_auth (userid, auth) values (#{userid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{auth, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
insert into COTDL.tbl_member_auth (userid, auth) values (#{userid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{auth, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select userid, auth from cotdl.tbl_member_auth where userid= #{userid} and auth= #{auth, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: delete from cotdl.tbl_member_auth where userid= #{userid} and auth= #{auth, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and userid != 'admin'
delete from cotdl.tbl_member_auth where userid= #{userid} and userid != 'admin'
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_member_auth set auth= #{authtochange, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where userid= #{userid} and auth= #{auth, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and userid != 'admin'
mapper.select:
select a.userid, b.username, a.auth from cotdl.tbl_member_auth a, cotdl.tbl_member b where b.userid != 'admin' and a.userid = b.userid
order by auth limit #{offset}, #{amount}
select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_member_auth a, cotdl.tbl_member b where b.userid != 'admin' and a.userid = b.userid
